name: Lucide
description: Community-maintained open-source icon library forked from Feather Icons with 1000+ consistent SVG icons. Provides React, Vue, Svelte, and Angular packages actively updated by the community.

seo.title: Lucide — Design Tools / Design-to-Code
seo.meta_description: Lucide: Community-maintained open-source icon library forked from Feather Icons with 1000+ consistent SVG icons. Provides React, Vue, Svelte, and Angular packag

when_to_use: 1000+ consistent SVG icons installed as React npm package
Icon set swapped from Feather to Lucide for active maintenance
Vue icon components tree-shaken to zero unused icon weight
Design system token mapping icon names to Lucide components
Accessible icon buttons with aria-label from Lucide set

pros: Actively maintained fork of Feather with 1000+ icons
First-class packages for React, Vue, Svelte, Angular
cons: Single visual weight limits stylistic variation
Lacks duotone and fill variants found in Phosphor
Consistency can slip with community contributions
Bundle size grows if importing icons carelessly
review.verdict: The go-to open-source icon library for most 2026 web apps — clean, well-maintained, and framework-friendly.
review.best_for: Modern web apps wanting a clean, consistent, community-maintained icon set.
review.not_for: Projects needing multiple visual weights, duotone styles, or mobile-native icon packs.
